subcodes.first_line: O thou daughter of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received. Owing to the lack of time I write a brief answer.... Glad-tiding! Glad-tiding! The morn of guidance hath dawned!
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @call to action, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise and encouragement
